li.xpath: Defs/ThingDef[(defName='Tiger' or defName='Cat_Scimitar' or defName='Heron' or defName='Quail' or defName='Mink' or defName='PrairieDog' or defName='Moose' or defName='LavaSnail')]/modExtensions/li[@Class='VEF.AnimalBehaviours.ExtendedRaceProperties']

nomatch.xpath: Defs/ThingDef[(defName='Tiger' or defName='Cat_Scimitar' or defName='Heron' or defName='Quail' or defName='Mink' or defName='PrairieDog' or defName='Moose' or defName='LavaSnail')]

li.xpath: Defs/ThingDef[(defName='HermitCrab' or defName='StoneCrab' or defName='Bullfrog' or defName='ColossusToad' or defName='Hippo' or defName='Armadillo' or defName='Wolverine' or defName='Badger' or defName='Otter' or defName='Alligator' or defName='Porcupine' or defName='Megavole')]/modExtensions/li[@Class='VEF.AnimalBehaviours.ExtendedRaceProperties']

nomatch.xpath: Defs/ThingDef[(defName='HermitCrab' or defName='StoneCrab' or defName='Bullfrog' or defName='ColossusToad' or defName='Hippo' or defName='Armadillo' or defName='Wolverine' or defName='Badger' or defName='Otter' or defName='Alligator' or defName='Porcupine' or defName='Megavole')]
